function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { forall(x3: T0) { x0(x1(x3)) = x3 and x2(x1(x3)) = x3 } = category_id_endpoints_constraint[T0, T1](x0, x2, x1) }[O, O](identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O])
not category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, O](identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O]) or forall(x0: O) { identity_fn(identity_fn(x0)) = x0 and identity_fn(identity_fn(x0)) = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: O) { not category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, O](identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O]) or (identity_fn(identity_fn(x0)) = x0 and identity_fn(identity_fn(x0)) = x0) })
(forall(x0: O) { not category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, O](identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O]) or identity_fn(identity_fn(x0)) = x0 })

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: (T0, T0) -> T0) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0, x5: T0) { x0(x3) != x1(x4) or x0(x4) != x1(x5) or x2(x3, x2(x4, x5)) = x2(x2(x3, x4), x5) } = category_assoc_constraint[T1, T0](x0, x1, x2) }[O, O](identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O], discrete_compose[O])

(forall(x0: O, x1: O) { not category_assoc_constraint[O, O](identity_fn[O], identity_fn[O], discrete_compose[O]) or identity_fn(x0) != identity_fn(x1) or discrete_compose(discrete_compose(x1, x0), x0) = discrete_compose(x1, discrete_compose(x0, x0)) })
